_comment: EuroNCAP protocol thresholds. Update these when protocols change - no code edits needed.
_README: Edit VALUES only - never the Python. Any key starting with '_' is documentation and is ignored by the loader.
Numbers (lane_width_m, junction_radius_m, expected_decel_ms2, speed_sanity_max_kmh, ...) - just change the value.

Add a NEW scenario type: add ONE entry under 'scenarios' keyed by its tag (e.g. 'CCRm' or 'CPNA-75'). Its tag is auto-registered for detection - you do NOT need to also edit naming_convention.valid_prefixes.
A scenario entry needs: type (longitudinal/crossing/head-on), optional vut_speed_range_kmh [min,max], optional target_speed_kmh, impact_overlap_pct, direction.
Accept a new actor name: add it to vut_entity_names (for the VUT) or encap_actor_names (for targets).
Add a vehicle/VRU size for the impact geometry: add an entry under vehicle_dimensions keyed by the entity name.
_geometry_tolerances_comment: Tuning knobs for geometry checks (previously hardcoded in Python). Safe to leave at defaults.
_curve_radii_comment: Protocol Part 2 (constant-radius arc) values for CPTA/CCFtap/CMFtap/CBTA paths. Source: EuroNCAP Frontal Collisions v1.1 Table 1.2.4. Used by CH_SC_07 to PASS/FAIL instead of MANUAL_REVIEW when VUT speed and turn direction are known.
_ASSUMPTIONS_TO_VERIFY: These values were inferred by tooling, NOT confirmed by an engineer. Verify against protocol:
scenarios.*.type (longitudinal/crossing/head-on) - inferred from the EuroNCAP scenario name; confirm each.
scenarios.*.vut_speed_range_kmh - padded ranges. The exact per-test speed is encoded in each scenario filename (e.g. '30VUT' = 30 km/h); confirm the allowed range per scenario type.
scenarios.*.impact_overlap_pct - the per-scenario target; cross-checked against the filename token (e.g. '50Imp', '10Imp'). CPTA corrected 50->10 to match its '10Imp' filename.

junction_scenario_prefixes - which scenario prefixes are treated as EuroNCAP intersections (drives CH_RD_03/04/05/06). CONFIRMED-from-checklist values (do NOT flag): junction radius 8 m (CH_RD_03), leftmost road at (0,0,0) (CH_RD_04), simulation time 100-150 s (CH_SC_04), lane width 3.5 m (CH_RD_01), deceleration -4 m/s2 (CH_MR_02).

naming_convention.description: Scenario name must contain a recognised EuroNCAP scenario tag followed by optional speed suffix
